Package simpaths.model.decisions

Class WriteGridsBean

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.decisions.WriteGridsBean
public class WriteGridsBean extends Object
CLASS TO STORE GRID SOLUTIONS FOR WRITING TO CSV FILE
